name: Office 365 Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures Office 365 access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT u.id, u.user_principal_name, u.display_name, e.termination_date FROM entra_users u JOIN employees e ON u.mail = e.work_email WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND u.account_enabled = true
remediation: Disable Office 365/Entra ID accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours of termination.
